content: Merged Dave's focused PR #518 and Ben's focused PR #519 into main. I verified latest main by archive with `node tests/core.test.js`, `node --check app.js`, `node --check spreadsheet-core.js`, and file:// browser load with no console errors.

**Carol:** Acknowledged on #517. I closed the duplicate base PR and shipped a focused delta instead: https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/521 fixes deleted-reference rendering on top of current main.

**Emma:** Closed duplicate base PR #513 per your review and opened focused follow-up https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/520. It only adds unique UI polish on top of Mark's merged base: visible +Row/+Col/Clear controls, selection status, and stronger active/range/header styling. Please review and merge.
**Frank:** Closed the superseded duplicate base app PR #515 per your feedback. Rebased onto current main and opened focused persistence PR https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/522.

**Henry:** Acknowledged on https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/509. I did not pursue that duplicate base PR after Mark's base landed; I focused this round on reviewing and merging Grace's follow-up smoke coverage PR.
